style_name: Analog Sticker Diary Portrait Poster Style
summary: A nostalgic analog diary-collage portrait system with a large side-profile illustrated subject, cream graph-paper background, sticker-like personal objects, distressed orange hand lettering, and heavy scanned print texture.
prompt_template:
Create a {ASPECT_RATIO} image in analog-sticker-diary-portrait-poster-style.

Subject: {SUBJECT}.
Subject action: {SUBJECT_ACTION}.
Primary prop: {PRODUCT_OR_PROP}.
Implied location: {LOCATION}.
Background elements: {BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS}.
Main headline text: "{MAIN_TEXT}".
Secondary micro text: "{SECONDARY_TEXT}".
Accent symbol: {ACCENT_SYMBOL}.
Wardrobe styling: {WARDROBE_STYLE}.

Use a large side-profile or quiet three-quarter illustrated portrait as the anchor. Put the subject on cream graph-paper notebook background with faded blue grid lines. Surround the portrait with sticker-like personal objects, tiny paper scraps, tickets, food packaging, stationery, charms, numbers, doodles, tape marks, and small hand-drawn icons.

Make the main headline huge, rough, hand-drawn, uppercase, orange-red, with blue or dark offset shadow, wrapping across hair, clothing, or open paper space. Keep the portrait calm and introspective while the sticker field feels busy and personal.

The image should feel like a scanned school notebook cover, teen sticker diary, analog music zine, and introspective poster. Add paper grain, halftone speckles, faded ink, smudges, fold marks, slight misregistration, and imperfect cutout edges.

Avoid watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, glossy 3D stickers, clean vector poster, corporate design, sterile spacing, plain background, perfect typography, and photorealistic studio portrait.
negative_prompt: watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, glossy 3D sticker render, clean vector art, corporate poster, minimalist layout, sterile white background, perfect typography, luxury editorial photo, photorealistic studio portrait, flat brand ad, low texture, empty background, plastic digital finish

variables.SUBJECT: main side-profile person, character, student, musician, traveler, or introspective figure
variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: quiet emotional action, listening, thinking, walking, studying, waiting, or holding a small prop
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: headphones, phone, notebook, snack, ticket, pencil, lighter, drink, cassette, charm, or personal object
variables.LOCATION: implied diary setting such as cafe, bedroom desk, subway, rooftop, classroom, street corner, or night bus
variables.BACKGROUND_ELEMENTS: graph paper, paper scraps, stickers, tickets, snack labels, numbers, doodles, tape, stationery, and tiny icons
variables.SECONDARY_TEXT: small repeated labels, tiny diary notes, numbers, times, or sticker text
variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: small flame, star, heart, teardrop, arrow, safety pin, fruit, ticket, or punctuation mark
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: casual youth styling, hoodie, school jacket, headphones, scarf, denim, soft layers, or city streetwear

variables.SUBJECT_ACTION: listening to music while staring past a rainy cafe window
variables.PRODUCT_OR_PROP: large cream over-ear headphones with tiny sticker decals

variables.ACCENT_SYMBOL: small flame sticker and blue teardrop marks
variables.WARDROBE_STYLE: navy school jacket, soft scarf, casual layered city clothes

example_cases.prompt_16x9: Create a 16:9 image in analog-sticker-diary-portrait-poster-style. Subject: a quiet young illustrator in side profile with short dark hair. Subject action: listening to music while staring past a rainy cafe window. Primary prop: large cream over-ear headphones with tiny sticker decals. Implied location: small neighborhood cafe table. Background elements: graph paper, coffee receipt, pastry sticker, pencil, cherry icon, blue ticket stub, tiny time labels, tape marks, and phone charm. Main headline text: "WHAT DID I JUST HEAR". Secondary micro text: "loop 03 / rainy table / back soon". Accent symbol: small flame sticker and blue teardrop marks. Wardrobe styling: navy school jacket, soft scarf, casual layered city clothes. Use a horizontal banner composition with the portrait on the left, facing into a wide field of stickers and text, cream graph-paper notebook background, huge rough orange-red hand lettering with blue shadow, scanned paper grain, halftone speckles, smudges, tape, faded ink, and imperfect cutout edges. Avoid watermark, username, creator ID, platform logo, QR code, app UI, glossy 3D stickers, clean vector poster, corporate design, plain background, perfect typography, and photorealistic studio portrait.
